product_type: Custom shock-resistant flight case for thermal camera inspection kit
use_case: Weekly transport of a thermal imaging kit between Aberdeen and offshore vessels, with frequent handling and occasional air freight.
requirements: Waterproof and shock-resistant case suitable for ATA-style transit
Wheels and pull handle for around 23 kg packed weight
Laser-cut foam insert with labelled compartments
Matte black finish with metal logo plate
Capacity for FLIR T865 camera body, 3 lenses, 2 battery chargers, cabling, and accessories
summary: Customer requests a custom flight case for a thermal camera kit used in offshore inspection operations. The case should be durable for frequent transport, include protective custom foam, and support heavy handling with wheels and a pull handle. They also request matte black branding and have provided reference attachments.
missing_information: Brand artwork file/specification for logo plate
Any required certification level beyond ATA-style suitability
